  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary objective of identifying a time series model?",
      "options": ["A) To forecast future values", "B) To identify trends and seasonality", "C) To compare models", "D) All of the above"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Identifying a time series model helps in understanding the characteristics of the data, such as trends, seasonality, and stationarity, which is essential for making accurate predictions and comparisons."
